description: This diagram illustrates a geometric interpretation rule for the delineation of linear features in Land Use / Land Cover (LULC) mapping, likely for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Urban Atlas (UA) product. It depicts a linear area, highlighted in light yellow, with two bounding wavy lines representing a feature's edges. The rule defines that if a linear feature has a minimum width of 10 meters at its wider sections and contains a segment where it narrows, provided this narrowed segment is 50 meters or less (≤ 50 m) in length, the entire feature is mapped and classified under the code "1.2.2.3". In the Urban Atlas classification, code 1.2.2.3 typically corresponds to "Other roads and associated land."
